title: tephrosia micrantha
intro: Tephrosia micrantha, also known as the small-flowered spider-flower, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Tephrosia micrantha include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
